sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15751" key="a)rtopope/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρτο-ποπέω</orth>, <sense id="n15751.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be a baker,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0496.tlg001:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
